channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: There's a social media groundswell predicting bitcoin above $90,000. That might be a problem.
item.description: The crowd is heavily leaning bullish, and that's often a contrarian signal, according to Santiment.

item.title: Polymarket denies data breach, says hacker is selling public data
item.description: The apparent hacker claimed to have breached other prediction markets and planned to release the data in the next few days.

item.title: Aptos says its new privacy coin seeks to fix one of crypto’s biggest trade-offs
item.description: Aptos said its new privacy coin could be used to enable businesses to transact onchain without competitors tracking treasury moves and trading strategies.

item.title: CFTC pulls Wisconsin into fight over prediction market jurisdiction
item.description: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Wisconsin in the agency’s fifth lawsuit against a US state to assert jurisdiction over prediction markets.

item.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto ATMs as fraud cases mount
item.description: Canada's Liberal government calls machines a “primary method” for scams as data and law enforcement link them to rising losses

item.title: 🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the endgame is to drive Bitcoin to $10M a coin and make Bitcoin a $200T network until it grows higher. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBmQmp6ZWJFYVNRT1N6S1pac21YNVB5c2hFRkcxVHZSRGFpUGRaMVFVdjRCbW4xbF9uMW1NZHZYZDduS09Ga3N2WGQwUzJheFhWbHg2OGRPYkM5bHJhb3Y3U3Jya1A?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: Michael Saylor says the…

item.title: XRP falls to $1.38 after breaking below $1.40 on rising selling pressure
item.description: High-volume move flips support into resistance, leaving price stuck at a key decision level.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to $77,000 ahead of Fed decision as Trump preps for lengthy Hormuz block
item.description: Bitcoin is sitting almost still while the rest of the majors give back gains and oil pushes above $111 on reports of an extended U.S. naval blockade against Iran.

item.title: Robinhood dips as Q1 earnings miss and crypto revenue, volume fall nearly 50%
item.description: Robinhood’s Q1 earnings per share and revenue figures missed industry expectations, sending the company’s shares down nearly 10%.

item.title: Bitcoin’s recent rally is largely fueled by Strategy purchases: Bitwise's Hougan
item.description: While Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and whale buying have contributed to the recent Bitcoin rally, the key driver has been consistent buying by Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, according to Bitwise's chief investment officer.

item.title: Institutional money is coming for bitcoin, but Adam Back says it moves slower than you think
item.description: The legendary cryptographer discusses institutional money flows into bitcoin.

item.title: Canadian Government Plans to Ban Crypto ATMs to Combat Scams According to CBC, Canadian federal government announced plans in its Spring Economic Update 2026 to ban cryptocurrency ATMs to protect citizens from fraud. The government identified c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5mX0l3UXZ3bEJ3S3JmRmhObVgzY0dQTkEzYURkamU4NTdCbEQ2VW15YS1aeUF4MzZDMjU2MExxRzVIY0t4aEpobEtJR2dFUG9wSUN5SjhZMjdHczZ6ZFgzcTM4aw?oc=5" target="_blank">Canadian Government Plans to Ban…

item.title: Judge rejects new trial for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried
item.description: A federal judge slammed Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for a new trial as seemingly “a plan to rescue his reputation,” denying the former FTX boss’s request.

item.title: The Treasury Department, through Economic Fury, has targeted Iran’s international shadow banking infrastructure, access to crypto, shadow fleet, weapons procurement networks, funding for terrorist proxies in the region, and independent Chinese “teapot” refi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE16ZjRia0Q2SmJRWi0tUy1yVEhBYjVFTTN1YlZ3cWtjQU0zSS02SHJRcGVPMEhyY19wNko2bjlvVVp6VldIcW1QdlExbTF5NHlINTk3dDJlX2FoQ2lNQ0RCVF9BTkp3VUE?oc=5" target="_blank">The Treasury Department, th…

item.title: Bitcoin rally falters as AI industry weakens and CLARITY Act approval odds fall
item.description: Bitcoin’s dip below $76,000 was driven by an AI sector sell-off and investors’ worries about slowed progress in the CLARITY Act negotiations.

item.title: Australia’s Crypto Crossroads: Regulation is Here, Now Comes the Hard Part
item.description: TL;DR Australian exchanges should not treat April 2027 as the first compliance date. AUSTRAC obligations and readiness expectations are already… The post Australia’s Crypto Crossroads: Regulation is Here, Now Comes the Hard Part appeared f…

item.title: AI Agent Deletes Startup’s Database in 9 Seconds, Founder Says
item.description: PocketOS founder Jeremy Crane claims a Cursor agent running Claude Opus wiped production data and backups through a single Railway API call.

item.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
item.description: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

item.title: OpenClaw Insider Builds the Enterprise Safety Layer the Project Never Shipped
item.description: Red Hat principal engineer and OpenClaw maintainer Sally O'Malley released Tank OS—a tool that sandboxes AI agents in isolated containers, keeping credentials locked and agents from interfering with each other or the host machine.

item.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
item.description: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

item.title: I want to be honest about where we're at. most crypto companies have trended to zero. most of the names you saw at the top last cycle aren't even building anymore. we've taken our share of hits too - endless FUD, a hack, numerous market pullbacks. and yet p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBRSGlwakJuM1NMMU41TmdwS1VGc3dJeHdVZGN4ZjV6ZU9relpUMjJhdlBFNHF0aGdiR3hLVFJGRGZLeHJsQVZDcjBwcWN2MUJXRmtNTUM0dWhqSFU?oc=5" target="_blank">I want to be honest about where we're at. m…

item.title: Dead Internet? A Third of New Websites Are AI-Generated, Says Stanford
item.description: A Stanford-led study quantified what everyone already suspected—but the findings aren't quite what people expected.

item.title: Robinhood stock falls 8% after big earnings miss due to weak crypto trading revenue
item.description: While the trading platform’s crypto revenue tanked 47% to $134 million, a record-breaking surge in prediction market bets helped push overall revenue up 15% to $1.07 billion.

item.title: Robinhood Shares Slide on 34% Decrease in Crypto Revenue
item.description: Retail brokerage Robinhood's business has gotten a boost from prediction markets, though its crypto trading revenue fell in Q1.

item.title: Google DeepMind Veteran Raises $1.1 Billion to Build AI That Isn’t Trained With Human Data
item.description: Ineffable Intelligence is betting that reinforcement learning is the path to superintelligence, rather than AI's large language models.

item.title: Bitcoin Coinbase Premium turns negative as BTC price drops, weekly losses top $829M
item.description: Bitcoin price followed weakening US spot market demand as the Coinbase Premium Index turned negative for the first time in three weeks.

item.title: Paul Tudor Jones calls bitcoin the 'best inflation hedge,' warns of overvalued stocks
item.description: It will be "really hard to make money" in stocks over the next decade, said the billionaire investor, noting that the S&P 500's valuation reminds him of the 2000 dot-com bubble.

item.title: RedStone launches settlement layer to address RWA liquidity gap in DeFi lending
item.description: A new system targets the mismatch between fast DeFi liquidations and slow asset redemptions, a key barrier to the use of tokenized assets in lending markets.

item.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
item.description: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.

item.title: Google Signs AI Deal With Pentagon for Classified Work as Employees Object
item.description: Google faces internal backlash as it signs a Pentagon AI deal for classified military work.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Trump family's World Liberty Financial partnered with crypto project linked to alleged scam-ring operators sanctioned by the US, WSJ reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5iVnJ0N1ZwWUZ6RVpSOFc0NG1LVzdCcjFtSllUYUc1SmtXWnloT0ZZckp3WUR3bW9zNzkwTm1GbUY4eVZUdDBXM2xfTVdRa21GcVZ1SkhNZkU4WnV1V0xJR0Z3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Trump family's World…

item.title: CFTC sues Wisconsin in agency's legal campaign defending prediction markets authority
item.description: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission added Wisconsin to the list of states it's sued over event-contract jurisdiction, most recently New York.

item.title: Since being acquired by China, @Forbes has become a political weapon and an embarrassment to journalism. Just over a year ago, American Bitcoin did not exist. 7 Months and 25 days ago we went public on the NASDAQ. Today we hold over 7,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE0ya09QM3N4dURoblF1ZV93WWJrYVhNWkRHUVNzRGgxOTIxX0ZqQ3BmTm1tR0R5a1pmb1hDVl8tc0RmdFpTWmh6eVN5WWdJWlgtMnBFZ0dRRkNLWGRCMFc0?oc=5" target="_blank">Since being acquired by China, @Forbes…

item.title: IREN Price Target Cut as Bernstein Sees Firm Dumping Bitcoin Mining for AI
item.description: Bernstein analysts see IREN’s AI cloud prospects growing substantially in the coming years—and its Bitcoin business disappearing entirely.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
item.description: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

item.title: JUST IN: Block announces there's now over 808,000 Square merchants accepting bitcoin payments! 🤯 New businesses are accepting BTC every 8 seconds 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBLSXBXTFZLMDVubEdOWURiblBfMjM1RWFNTHNmS1d3VF9zX3FoQWRTQnFpZGRqazJxOTJ1anNrWnhlZE5uWV81WlhMTkk5LTc2YU9CSzNiZ21BYWhLQ1JTLUtISjM2WVU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Block announces th…

item.title: Canaan, Tether deepen partnership on immersion-cooled mining systems
item.description: Canaan secures a new Tether order for modular mining hardware as the stablecoin issuer expands into integrated, data center-style Bitcoin infrastructure.

item.title: World Cup fever: Chiliz expands to Solana and Base to supercharge fan token trading
item.description: Chiliz rolled out its own layer-1 network in 2023 to host the trading of its tokens, but is transitioning to what it calls "omnichain distribution."

item.title: The age of Agentic Commerce has arrived. Consensus 2026 is where you can experience it IRL
item.description: AI agents are already transacting. The question now is what kind of financial infrastructure they run on -and who builds it.

item.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
item.description: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

item.title: Polymarket reportedly seeking CFTC approval to reopen main exchange to U.S. traders
item.description: If approved, the move would help Polymarket compete with Kalshi in the U.S., and bring more event-trading activity under CFTC regulatory oversight.

item.title: Riot extends $200 million Coinbase credit facility, and bitcoin weakness could mean more sales
item.description: The miner locked in fixed borrowing costs and extended maturity, but a shrinking BTC treasury and loan-to-value triggers leave little room for error if prices slide.

item.title: Microsoft says legacy banks are hitting a breaking point as AI takes over the heavy lifting
item.description: Microsoft and Chainalysis executives warned that as AI agents begin managing transactions at scale, the financial industry must overhaul its legacy infrastructure to prioritize machine identity and trust.

item.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
item.description: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

item.title: Inside Trump’s Meme Coin Bash: Foreign Guests, Iran War Riffs, and Mar-a-Lago Charm
item.description: The president discussed policy, technology, and war with his top meme coin holders on Saturday at a private Mar-a-Lago gathering.

item.title: BitMart x EAT Trade-to-Feed competition to pay out $4.4m USDT to traders in May 2026
item.description: The 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition marks BitMart's 8th anniversary and the exchange's strategic listing of EAT, the first cause coin.

item.title: A crypto coalition releases technical proposal to save Aave users from a massive token exploit
item.description: DeFi United, a coalition of multiple blockchain projects and crypto ecosystem individuals, has laid out a detailed plan to restore the backing of rsETH after this month’s Kelp DAO hack sent shockwaves through lending markets.

item.title: Bitcoin price drops below $76K as onchain data sends mixed signals
item.description: Bitcoin failed to break $80,000 resistance amid weak onchain fundamentals, but rising spot CVD could support a recovery.

item.title: Every blockchain transaction is a gift to your competition
item.description: As AI Agents reshape commerce, and make every business an open book, companies will need to figure out what data actually needs to be kept secret – and protect it ferociously – in order to thrive.

item.title: Hyperliquid Gains Counter $216 Million Q1 Loss at Novogratz's Galaxy Digital
item.description: CEO Mike Novogratz said Galaxy Digital’s balance sheet suffered because crypto prices are down, yet Hyperliquid partially offset losses.

item.title: 'Crypto Godfather' says bitcoin has not reached its bottom and a new all-time high is off the table for 2026
item.description: The early bitcoin investor and author of Bitcoin Supercycle says bitcoin needs to drop to about $57,000 sometime in October before beginning its ascent. A market analyst disagrees.

item.title: Galaxy Digital posts $216M Q1 loss as crypto market slides 20%
item.description: Mike Novogratz's Galaxy Digital posted a $216 million first-quarter loss as weaker crypto prices hit asset values, while Helios data center revenue nears.

item.title: AML crackdown eclipses securities enforcement as crypto’s top regulatory risk: Report
item.description: US Anti-Money Laundering fines hit $900 million in the first half of 2025 as enforcement shifted from securities cases, while Basel rules and mandatory audits reshape crypto compliance, according to CertiK.

item.title: Can Bitcoin hit $250K this year? Traders say it may be time to ‘sell in May’
item.description: Veteran trader Peter Brandt and other analysts question the $250,000 Bitcoin target, warning the current bear phase may not be over.

item.title: Not a theft, but a statement: Inside the Bitcoin proposal to reassign Satoshi-linked coins
item.description: Paul Sztorc says he can't move a single sat of Satoshi's bitcoin and isn't trying to. But critics say rewriting forked-chain balances at addresses a user does not control sets a bad precedent.

item.title: Meta Turns to Space-Based Solar Energy to Power AI Data Centers on Earth
item.description: Facebook parent company Meta secured up to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power as AI drives demand for electricity.

item.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
item.description: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

item.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
item.description: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

item.title: Galaxy Digital delivers first data center tranche to CoreWeave after narrowing Q1 loss
item.description: Galaxy secured approval to double its Helios data center power capacity to over 1.6GW, building on its strategic expansion into AI infrastructure.
